name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 6 Jan 2021
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now resend a campaign to a contact with a simple click of a button. To learn more about the enhancement, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancement","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Resend Campaigns","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Maybe your email got soft-bounced, or maybe you want to give your recipient another chance to engage! Whatever your reasons are, if you are resending an email campaign to a contact, you can now do so with just a click of a button."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":":"},{"text":" ","bold":true},{"text":"The resend option will not be available if:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"the campaign gets hard-bounced."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"the campaign is sent through Journey."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"the contact has added themselves to the DNM list."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the Contact Overview page (to learn more about contact overview, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Viewing-a-Contact-Overview","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Viewing a Contact Overview"}]},{"text":"), the Customer Engagement Journey section now dynamically shows the Re-Send Campaign button for the campaigns sent to the contact."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ContactOverview.0685g000006w7unAAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ContactOverview.0685g000006w7unAAA.png","name":"Contact_Overview","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":2390,"width":3036}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Click Re-Send Campaign, and you will be redirected to the Re-Send Campaign page where you can review your campaign and finally resend it."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ResendCampaign.0685g000006w7uxAAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ResendCampaign.0685g000006w7uxAAA.png","name":"Resend_Campaign","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":4496,"width":3036}}]}]
